do_not_merge.reason: Contradiction test: different geographic scope – Woodhaven Blvd (Queens, Q52/Q53 SBS) vs 79th Street (Manhattan, M79 SBS). Same project name alone is insufficient; corridor/scope is a strong identity field per project rule.

weak_aliases.reason: Shared alias 'project_2017-st-improvement-project' is common to all records; useful for search but not merge authority due to differing scope.

suggestion.rationale: Records B (project_2017-street-improvement-79th) and C (project_79th-st-2017-improvement-cb7-apr2025) both describe the 2017 Street Improvement Project on 79th Street in Manhattan (M79 SBS). They share the same corridor/scope and differ only in lifecycle status and source details, so they merge. Record A (project_2017-sip-woodhaven-blvd-cb5-sept2024) is a distinct project on Woodhaven Blvd in Queens (Q52/Q53 SBS). Despite sharing the same official project name and some aliases, the different geographic scope (corridor, borough, routes) is a strong identity field contradiction per the project rule, so do_not_merge. The system had previously attached Woodhaven data to Record B, but this is a merge error; the canon requires separation.
